props.ChoiceText: Someone with influence took note of your work and began treating you as more than a common hand, though never as someone free of expectation.
props.ChoiceBio: A patron's eye turned your work into opportunity, dependence, and ambition all at once.

0.TransitionText: Because a patron's eye turned your work into opportunity and made ambition harder to ignore, your life stayed with tools, labor, and the discipline of making things well.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a patron's eye turned your work into opportunity, dependence, and ambition all at once, workmanship lifted into display, taste, and celebrated craft.
1.TransitionPrompt: A patron can draw you into display, favor, and celebrated craft. Will you follow that path?

2.TransitionText: Because a patron's eye turned your work into opportunity, dependence, and ambition all at once, skilled work hardened into authority over other working hands.
2.TransitionPrompt: A patron can also lift you toward oversight and authority. Will you follow that path?
